about.title: About Us
about.companyStory: Founded by Habib Rahman Yonocy, YonocyTech is a technology company dedicated to innovation and excellence. We combine technical expertise with creative thinking to deliver solutions that transform businesses.
about.mission: Empowering businesses through smart technology solutions.
about.vision: To be a leading technology innovator in the region.
about.founderBio: With over 5 years of experience in software development and technology consulting, Habib Rahman Yonocy founded YonocyTech with a vision to bridge the gap between cutting-edge technology and real-world business needs.
about.whyUsExpertiseDesc: Deep technical knowledge across multiple domains
about.whyUsQualityDesc: Commitment to delivering excellence in every project

services.mobileDevDesc: Native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android.
services.aiSolutionsDesc: Intelligent solutions leveraging AI and ML to automate and optimize your business processes.
services.itConsultingDesc: Strategic technology consulting to help you make informed decisions and achieve your goals.
services.digitalMarketingDesc: Data-driven digital marketing strategies to grow your online presence and reach.
services.customSoftwareDesc: Tailored software solutions designed specifically for your unique business requirements.
